chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 236 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.6752/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.6753/2025 (R/Surety) 25.11.2025 Mr. Athar Hussain Abro, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. This application has been filed by the applicant seeking return of surety document. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Ghulam Fareed Gopang was granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 21.03.2025, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/-, for which the applicant stood surety by depositing an original special savings certificate of such amount. Thereafter, the bail application of accused was dismissed as being infructuous vide order dated 13.11.2025 on account of conclusion of the main case, wherein he has been acquitted by the learned trial Court by way of compromise, as is evident from the order dated 14.10.2025, annexed with this application. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, learned Additional Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
